title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - First Insight

title: Find your path with new handheld GPS devices from Garmin
text: Versatile GPSMAP 67 Series and eTrex SE handhelds have longer battery life, improved positional accuracy, and global communication via inReach satellite technology OLATHE, Kan. , March 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the GPSMAP® 67 Series  and the eTrex® SE  – the latest additions to its impressive lineup of outdoor navigation devices.

title: 7 Stocks That Will Bring Success to the Dividend Investor
text: With the market likely to encounter myriad variables this year, investors should really consider dividend stocks to buy. Fundamentally, companies that provide passive income to their stakeholders tend to weather down cycles better than their growth-centric counterparts.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Smartwatch Offerings With Latest Update

title: Garmin adds AMOLED displays to its next-gen Forerunner 265 and Forerunner 965 GPS running watches
text: Advanced training metrics, recovery insights and everyday health stats help you train brilliantly—all on Garmin's brightest running smartwatches ever OLATHE, Kan. , March 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the Forerunner® 265 series  and Forerunner 965 , its first dedicated GPS running smartwatches with vibrant AMOLED displays.
